parsed.answer: 7 continents. The standard model recognizes: Africa, Antarctica, Asia, Europe, North America, Oceania (Australia), and South America. Note: Some regions use different models (5 or 6 continents) depending on how they classify continental boundaries, but 7 is the most widely used internationally.
